Package neqsim.process.safety.opendrain

Class OpenDrainReviewEngine

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.opendrain.OpenDrainReviewEngine
public class OpenDrainReviewEngine extends Object
Deterministic NORSOK S-001 Clause 9 review engine for open-drain systems.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors

    static final String

    Drain boxes, pipes, and fire divisions clause.
    static final String
    NORSOK_S001

    addRequiredBoolean(OpenDrainReviewResult result, OpenDrainReviewItem item, String requirementId, String clause, String key, String passMessage, String recommendation)
    Adds a boolean requirement assessment.

    calculateConfidence(OpenDrainReviewItem item)
    Calculates evidence confidence from key fields and source references.

    checkBackpressureAndBackflow(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks backpressure and backflow prevention.
    private void
    checkBunding(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks bunding around flammable liquid tanks and vessels.
    private void
    checkCapacity(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result, double defaultLiquidLeakRateKgPerS)
    Checks open-drain capacity for fire water and process-fire leak load.
    private void
    checkDesignStandardEvidence(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks documented design standards.
    private void
    checkDrainSeparation(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks separation between closed/open drains and hazardous/non-hazardous drains.
    private void
    checkDrillingProductionSeparation(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks separation between drilling and production open-drain systems.
    private void
    checkFireDivisionIntegrity(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks fire-division integrity around drain boxes and drain piping.
    private void
    checkFloaterSpreading(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks spreading controls for floating facilities.
    private void
    checkHazardousDrainTank(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks hazardous-area collection tank purge or inerting.
    private void
    checkHelideckDrainage(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks helideck dedicated drain requirement.
    private void
    checkOperationalEvidence(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks optional tagreader or historian evidence.
    private void
    checkSealsAndVentRouting(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks liquid/fire seals and vent routing.
    private void
    checkSpillCollection(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks that flammable or hazardous liquid spills are collected and drained.
    private void
    checkTemporaryStorageDrainage(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks tote-tank and temporary flammable liquid storage drainage.
    private void
    checkUtilityIndependence(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)
    Checks that open-drain function is not utility dependent.
    private boolean
    containsIgnoreCase(String text, String token)
    Tests whether text contains a token ignoring case.
    OpenDrainReviewReport
    evaluate(OpenDrainReviewInput input)
    Evaluates normalized open-drain review input.

    evaluateItem(OpenDrainReviewItem item, double defaultLiquidLeakRateKgPerS)
    Evaluates one open-drain review item.

    isHelideck(OpenDrainReviewItem item)
    Tests whether an item is a helideck drain.

    joinLower(List<String> values)
    Joins strings into lower-case text.
    private boolean
    requiresDrainageReview(OpenDrainReviewItem item)
    Determines whether the item is in scope for open-drain review.

  • Method Details

    • evaluate

      public OpenDrainReviewReport evaluate(OpenDrainReviewInput input)
      Evaluates normalized open-drain review input.
      Parameters:
      input - normalized open-drain review input
      Returns:
      aggregated review report

    • evaluateItem

      public OpenDrainReviewResult evaluateItem(OpenDrainReviewItem item, double defaultLiquidLeakRateKgPerS)
      Evaluates one open-drain review item.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      defaultLiquidLeakRateKgPerS - default worst credible process fire leak rate in kg/s
      Returns:
      item review result

      private void checkDesignStandardEvidence(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainReviewResult result)

      Parameters:
      item - review item
      result - result receiving assessments

    • addRequiredBoolean

      private void addRequiredBoolean(OpenDrainReviewResult result, OpenDrainReviewItem item, String requirementId, String clause, String key, String passMessage, String recommendation)
      Adds a boolean requirement assessment.
      Parameters:
      result - result receiving the assessment
      item - review item
      requirementId - requirement identifier
      clause - clause identifier
      key - boolean evidence key
      passMessage - message when requirement is met
      recommendation - recommendation for missing or failing evidence

    • calculateConfidence

      private double calculateConfidence(OpenDrainReviewItem item)
      Calculates evidence confidence from key fields and source references.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      Returns:
      confidence from 0 to 1

    • requiresDrainageReview

      private boolean requiresDrainageReview(OpenDrainReviewItem item)
      Determines whether the item is in scope for open-drain review.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      Returns:
      true when the item should be reviewed

    • isHelideck

      private boolean isHelideck(OpenDrainReviewItem item)
      Tests whether an item is a helideck drain.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      Returns:
      true when item is helideck-related

      private String joinLower(List<String> values)
      Joins strings into lower-case text.
      Parameters:
      values - values to join
      Returns:
      lower-case combined text

    • containsIgnoreCase

      private boolean containsIgnoreCase(String text, String token)
      Tests whether text contains a token ignoring case.
      Parameters:
      text - text to search
      token - token to find
      Returns:
      true when token is present
